texto: In middle school I played against you once. And lost. I was so frustrated that I continued practicing even after I retired... And then when I entered high school, hell yeah, I laughed. The guy I vowed to defeat no matter what was standing right in front of me as one of my own teammates. But now it's pointless to hold a grudge. Rather, I wanted to make you recognize me. (Takao Kazunari)
explicacao: Citação de Tadatoshi Fujimaki sobre temas ligados a educacao. “In middle school I played against you once. And lost.
